steps.t: Faramir is just outside Ondoher's Folly in Dagorlad. You should speak to Faramir when you are ready to assault Ondoher's Folly and confront the Bloodl…
Faramir can be found at Ondoher's Folly. Burudagath has been defeated and Faramir has reappeared within the Fane of Screaming at Ondoher's Folly.
